name: Taxonomy & Systematics
description: Research on species classification, new species descriptions, phylogenetics, and taxonomy.

name: Disease & Pathogens
description: Studies on aquatic diseases, parasites, bacteria, viruses, and immunology.

name: Husbandry & Biology
description: Aquarium-relevant biology including nutrition, water quality, behavior, reproduction, and physiology.

name: Microbiology & AMR
description: Research on microbiomes, antimicrobial resistance, and microbial communities in aquatic environments.

name: Trade & Conservation
description: Research related to the ornamental pet trade, invasive species from the trade, and captive breeding for conservation.
